maml:description.maml:para: Hostname or IP of the Proxmox VE server.
Output the session object to the pipeline.
Hostname or IP of the Proxmox VE server.
Username and password. Username must include realm (e.g. root@pam).
Output the session object to the pipeline.
Username and password. Username must include realm (e.g. root@pam).
Output the session object to the pipeline.
Hostname or IP of the Proxmox VE server.

Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
